allow: PowerShell($found = @\(\); foreach \($p in @\("$env:APPDATA\\npm\\claude.cmd","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\claude.ps1","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\claude\\claude.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\bin\\claude.exe","$env:USERPROFILE\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\claude.exe"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { $found += $p } }; try { $g = \(Get-Command claude.cmd -ErrorAction Stop\).Source; $found += $g } catch {}; if \($found.Count -gt 0\) { $found } else { "not found in common locations" }; "---npm root---"; try { npm root -g } catch { "no npm" })
PowerShell(Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.TaskPath -eq '\\' } | Select-Object TaskName, State | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SOC-DailyReport' | Select-Object TaskName,State; \(Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'SOC-DailyReport' | Get-ScheduledTaskInfo\) | Select-Object LastRunTime,LastTaskResult,NextRunTime")

PowerShell($c = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\VidhyaV\\soc-monitor\\daily-report.cmd'; "Total lines: $\($c.Count\) \(should be 11\)"; "--- line 8 length: $\($c[7].Length\) chars ---"; "Cato IPs present: $\([bool]\($c[7] -match '140\\.82\\.202\\.196'\)\)"; "Per-GL streams present: $\([bool]\($c[7] -match 'OP-GL = External_SFTP'\)\)"; "DTC streams kept: $\([bool]\($c[7] -match 'Rebex_PROD'\)\)"; "findings-json contract kept: $\([bool]\($c[7] -match 'findings-json'\)\)"; "No PDF directive kept: $\([bool]\($c[7] -match 'Do NOT generate'\)\)")

Bash(ls -la "/c/Users/VidhyaV/soc-monitor/.onedrive-folder-url" 2>/dev/null && echo "--- content ---" && cat "/c/Users/VidhyaV/soc-monitor/.onedrive-folder-url" 2>/dev/null; echo "=== SOC-Reports folder ==="; ls -la "/c/Users/VidhyaV/OneDrive - casepoint/SOC-Reports/" 2>/dev/null | head -20)

PowerShell($mods = 'PnP.PowerShell','Microsoft.Graph','Microsoft.Graph.Sites','Microsoft.Graph.Files','Az.Accounts','MSAL.PS'; foreach\($m in $mods\){ $f = Get-Module -ListAvailable -Name $m | Select-Object -First 1; if\($f\){ "{0,-28} v{1}" -f $m,$f.Version } else { "{0,-28} NOT INSTALLED" -f $m } }; "---PSVersion---"; $PSVersionTable.PSVersion.ToString\(\))

PowerShell($f='C:\\Users\\VidhyaV\\soc-monitor\\send-report.ps1'; $errs=$null; $null=[System.Management.Automation.Language.Parser]::ParseFile\($f,[ref]$null,[ref]$errs\); if\($errs\){ "PARSE ERRORS:"; $errs | ForEach-Object { $_.Message } } else { "send-report.ps1: parses cleanly, no syntax errors" }; "--- link file ---"; Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\VidhyaV\\soc-monitor\\.onedrive-folder-url')
